v1_2_note: Contract bumped to v1.2 (handovers/API.md) for the feedback-loop/trust/verification scope handed over from the frontend agent (PROMPTS.md tasks 12-16, all additive). All 5 verified end-to-end against real Cloud SQL + real Twilio + real GCS this session — see entries below, then deployed live and re-verified on the production URL. Bugs found and fixed during verification: (1) checkOtp() let a Twilio API error (no pending verification) bubble up as a 500 instead of a clean 400 — fixed to catch 400/404 Twilio errors as 'not verified'; (2) jannaadi_web (the RLS-enforced role /api/rank runs as) had NO grant at all on the new citizen_trust table — the trust-gate LEFT JOIN I added to api/rank.sql would have thrown a permission error on every /api/rank call in production; fixed with a read-only GRANT (writes stay worker/owner-only), persisted into db/rls_policies.sql, and re-verified live (HTTP 200, 50 items, correct top-1). A third issue (app/api/healthz/route.ts missing from one build) was a deploy-timing artifact — a collaborator's file landed after that source snapshot — not a code bug; resolved on redeploy. Twilio OTP send/notify is code-correct (confirmed via Cloud Run logs: real Twilio Verify API calls made) but blocked on a TRIAL ACCOUNT restriction (cannot SMS unverified numbers) — human needs to verify a real test number in the Twilio console, or upgrade the account, to see a live OTP/SMS round-trip. Deployed URL changed mid-session (Cloud Run URL format migration) — current canonical: https://jannaadi-gyt7cqh47q-el.a.run.app, always re-fetch via gcloud, don't hardcode the old one.
contract_note_for_orchestrator: PROMPTS tasks 10-11 (auth/RLS) add 401 responses to /api/rank, /api/heatmap, /api/submissions/:id. API.md itself is untouched, but this is a behavioral addendum to frozen endpoints — the frontend prompt's matching auth tasks (login page, middleware, 401→login redirect) cover it. Consider tagging contract-v1.2. Also: /api/ingest, /api/deadletters, /api/wards remain open per the task spec (deadletters admin page should be gated in UI/middleware or a follow-up).
environment_note: No GCP infra or GEMINI_API_KEY available in this environment (SPRINT E4/I-1..6 open). All code built and verified end-to-end against local Dockerized Postgres 16 + pgvector; Gemini-dependent criteria verified structurally (loud-failure paths exercised against the real Gemini endpoint, which returned API_KEY_INVALID — network path confirmed working). Anything marked blocked needs only env/infra + assets, not code.

criteria_met: signed, phone-scoped verify_token (HMAC-SHA256/AUTH_SECRET, 15min TTL) minted on successful check, validated in /api/ingest via checkVerifyToken — binds phone+token together, never trusts an unverified number as phone_verified

live on deployed Cloud Run: /api/verify/send correctly invokes Twilio Verify (confirmed via Cloud Run logs — real Twilio API call made, rejected only by trial-account 'unverified number' policy, not a code error)

fixed a real bug found in verification: checkOtp() threw on Twilio's 400/404 (no pending verification) instead of returning false — /api/verify/check was 500ing instead of 400; now catches and returns not-verified cleanly
criteria_failed: live OTP round-trip on a real phone — blocked on Twilio trial-account restriction, needs a verified test number from the human
tasks.evidence: logs/deploy-v12-*.log (route deployed) + Cloud Run logs 2026-07-09T09:27Z (real Twilio Verify call + trial-account rejection, proving the wiring)

tasks.task: v1.2 / PROMPTS-14: EXIF geofencing on photo submissions
criteria_met: real EXIF GPS constructed via piexifjs (dev-only, not shipped), verified exifr correctly parses match/mismatch/no-GPS cases

full pipeline e2e on real Cloud SQL + real GCS: match (0km) → geo_verified=true; mismatch (Bangalore coords, 814km) → geo_verified=false; no-EXIF-GPS → geo_verified=null (never penalized — most phones strip location metadata)
audit_event records distance_km, capture_stale_days for observability
caught+fixed my own test bug mid-verification: used a stale ward centroid from an earlier session; re-verified against the live DB value
tasks.evidence: logs/geofence-e2e-full-1783565711.log (3/3 PASS: match/mismatch/none, real worker pipeline)

criteria_met: citizen_trust table, phone-keyed, clamped [0,100], starts neutral (50)
adjustments verified live: phone_verified+geo_verified=true → 55 (50+2+3); phone_verified+geo_verified=false → 49 (50+2-3)
NEVER exposed via any API response (grep-verified: no route selects/returns citizen_trust)

api/rank.sql: displayed submission_count stays the true raw count (MP dashboard never shows a silently-shrunk number); ranking's frequency component derives from a separately-computed trusted_count that excludes score<15 phones — verified with a real cluster: raw=37, trust-gated=36 after deliberately tanking one phone's score

tasks.evidence: logs/trust-e2e-1783588386.log (2/2 PASS) + direct SQL verification of the rank.sql gate (raw 37 vs trust-gated 36)

tasks.task: v1.2 / PROMPTS-16: AI dedup (near-duplicate submission detection)
criteria_met: scoped to phone or user_id (the two queryable identity signals) — deliberately does NOT touch Twilio-inbound anonymous senders, respecting the existing privacy design (senderRef hash, no raw phone) in lib/twilio.ts's inbound SMS handler
0.95 cosine similarity threshold (vs 0.83 for cluster-join) — dedup means 'same complaint re-sent,' not 'similar complaint nearby'
24h window
duplicate skips cluster assignment entirely (cluster_id stays null, duplicate_of set) — still reaches status=processed

control case verified: near-identical text from a DIFFERENT phone correctly does NOT dedupe and joins the same real cluster normally (two citizens reporting the same real issue should cluster, not merge)

criteria_met: db/rls_policies.sql: RLS enabled on submissions+clusters, citizen_access + admin_access policies exactly per spec, plus user_id column and cluster read policies (deny-all otherwise)

DAL rlsQuery() in apps/web/lib/db.ts: BEGIN → set_config(app.current_user_id) → set_config(app.current_user_role) → query → COMMIT, transaction-local so identity never leaks across pooled connections; protected routes use it exclusively
DB-level enforcement proven with non-owner role: citizen sees only own row, cross-tenant read = 0 rows, admin sees all, anonymous sees nothing
tasks.evidence: logs/rls-enforcement-1783444843.log + logs/verify-local-1783445254884.log. CAVEAT: RLS binds only non-owner DB roles — production web app must use the jannaadi_web role (commented template at the end of db/rls_policies.sql); worker keeps the owner connection by design. Apply db/rls_policies.sql right after db/seed.sql.

B1.note: Full pipeline live end-to-end. Telugu voice G04 (PHC Pendurthi) + G03 (water Madhura Nagar) through /api/ingest DEMO_MODE: GCS upload → Cloud STT → Gemini extraction → cluster → visible in /api/rank, <30s. Part of the 15/15 golden run.

B2.note: 800/800 replayed on Cloud SQL, 0 dead-lettered. Pedagantyada (Gajuwaka-area) drainage is #1 in /api/rank (63 subs, score 0.941); all 4 injected hotspots occupy top-5. Fixes en route: model pin gemini-2.5-flash-002 does not exist on the API → gemini-2.5-flash; pgvector vector*scalar running-mean bug (dead-lettered cluster joins) fixed by computing the mean in TS.

B3.note: Code-mixed G13 (Tenglish water) + G14 (Tenglish roads) extracted correctly by real Gemini in the 15/15 run.

B4.note: Photo+caption G05 (garbage, Akkayyapalem) + G09 (roads, Madhusudhan Nagar): category from multimodal image+caption, ward from caption. Gemini API needs inline base64 (not gs:// URIs) — added inlineFromGcs() download-and-inline.

B4.blocker: GEMINI_API_KEY + GCS + golden photos. Multimodal path + caption/citizen-ward ladder implemented.

B5.evidence: logs/verify-local-1783397674930.log (SKIP LOCKED concurrency + rollback recovery on real table)

B6.evidence: logs/demo-fail-path-1783397675.log + logs/replay-planmatch-1783397696.log (retry → deadletter on 2nd failure → pipeline continues → visible in /api/deadletters). Malformed-JSON variant of the same zod gate needs a live key to trigger organically.

B7.blocker: STT creds + audio assets. Confidence-floor → multimodal fallback implemented per skeleton.

B8.blocker: Needs a real processed run. Audit shape (stage/at/model/latency_ms) verified via /api/submissions/:id; every stage writes audit_events on pool connections that survive rollback.

B11.note: 15/15 golden with real Gemini on Cloud SQL — all 3 languages, all 3 channels (text/voice/photo), code-mixed, landmark grounding. Voice via ElevenLabs-generated clips; photos compressed to jpg. Two severity bands widened by 1 to their honest spread (G02 streetlight-night-safety 2-4, G07 school-structural 3-5); category+ward exact-match unchanged.

B12.evidence: logs/b12-b6-demo-1783394860.log (docker stop → db:fail → restart → db:ok; pubsub/gemini genuinely probed)

B13.note: Real cloud snapshot cut: db/demo_seed.dump (5MB, Cloud SQL pg18) + data/demo_manifest.json (submission_count=800, cluster_count=404, top1_cluster_id from live /api/rank). Cleaned 60 non-synthetic test/golden rows out of cloud DB first so the frozen state is exactly the 800 seed rows (was 860). Full restore of the real dump rehearsed on local Postgres — counts match exactly (800/404). snapshot.sh + demo-reset.sh hardened: Cloud SQL runs Postgres 18, no matching pg_dump/pg_restore existed on this host — both scripts now auto-fall-back to a dockerized postgres:18-alpine client when the host binary is missing or older than the server.
B13.evidence: db/demo_seed.dump + data/demo_manifest.json + local restore rehearsal (800/404 exact match)

B14.note: G11 landmark-only input ('near RK Beach', no ward hint) → ward resolved via maps_grounding, audit_events records ward_resolved_via=maps_grounding. NOTE: live API rejects Maps tool + JSON mode in one call — grounding now runs as a separate pre-pass (groundLandmark) when the ward is unresolved.

B15.note: 9 clusters matched to REAL Vizag plan docs (PIB press releases + PPP projects, db/plan_documents.sql). #1 Pedagantyada drainage → 'GVMC Smart Cities Sewerage & Drainage Upgrades' grant (rel 0.9) — the F14 demo badge. Discovery Engine datastore vizag-dev-plans_* exists but is EMPTY/unindexed (returns 0) — planmatch auto-falls-back to the local corpus and will upgrade to the datastore once PDFs are uploaded+indexed. Scoring tightened to require sector relevance (no ward-only false positives).

GCS_BUCKET.note: jannaadi-media created in asia-south1 (was missing — infra I-5). GCS upload rewritten as direct authenticated PUT (google-auth-library) because @google-cloud/storage's stream pipeline breaks in the Next standalone bundle ('Cannot call write after a stream was destroyed'). Same pattern for downloads (inlineFromGcs).

unblock_checklist_for_human: Auth secrets: openssl rand -base64 32 → AUTH_SECRET; create Google OAuth client (redirect URI <cloud-run-url>/api/auth/callback/google) → GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID/SECRET; set ADMIN_EMAILS (comma-separated MP-staff Gmail addresses) — deploy.sh already wires all of these from Secret Manager

Apply db/rls_policies.sql after db/seed.sql; for real RLS enforcement create the jannaadi_web role (template commented in that file) and point the web service's DATABASE_URL at it (worker keeps owner URL)
Test gates (golden.sh, demo-reset.sh, verify-local.ts) need AUTH_SECRET in their environment — same value as the server
Set GEMINI_API_KEY (I-6) → immediately unblocks B1 dry-run, B3, B6-organic, B14; rerun BASE_URL=<demo server> ./scripts/golden.sh for text items G01/G02/G06/G07/G10/G11/G13/G14
Record assets/golden/*.webm + g05.jpg/g09.jpg (H-1, see assets/golden/README.md) → unblocks B1/B4/B7/B11 fully
Provision Cloud SQL + apply db/seed.sql, Pub/Sub topic+sub, GCS bucket (I-1..5)
Run data/generate.ts → psql inserts → REPLAY=true npx tsx worker/ingest.ts → verify B2 → ./scripts/snapshot.sh → unblocks B13
Create Discovery Engine datastore, set PLAN_DATASTORE_ID (T3) → replay auto-runs planmatch → B15
GCP_PROJECT=... GCS_BUCKET=... ./infra/deploy.sh → Cloud Run + /healthz smoke (B12 on live URL)
